message:
🌱 Add GA4 analytics for from-lens tab switches and command copies (#2328)

* 🌱 Add GA4 analytics for from-lens deployment tab switches and command copies

- ksc_from_lens_tab_switch: fires when user switches between localhost/cluster-portforward/cluster-ingress tabs
- ksc_from_lens_command_copy: fires when user copies install commands, includes tab, step, and first command
- Copy button with checkmark feedback on each command block

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🌱 Lead localhost tab with curl-to-bash, add GA4 tab/copy tracking

- Localhost tab now leads with curl | bash one-liner instead of brew
- Adds ksc_from_lens_tab_switch and ksc_from_lens_command_copy GA4 events
- Copy button with checkmark feedback on each command block

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix curl command overflow — break into multi-line with shell continuation

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

No Go, Node.js, or build tools required.', }, ] @@ -268,6 +267,28 @@ function ComparisonCell({ value, note, isConsole }: { value: string | boolean; n function DeploymentSection() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState('localhost') + const [copiedStep, setCopiedStep] = useState(null) + const copiedTimerRef = useRef>() + + useEffect(() => { + return () => clearTimeout(copiedTimerRef.current) + }, []) + + const switchTab = useCallback((tab: DeployTab) => { + if (tab === activeTab) return + setActiveTab(tab) + emitFromLensTabSwitch(tab) + }, [activeTab]) + + const copyCommands = useCallback(async (commands: string[], step: number) => { + const text = commands.join('\n') + await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text) + const key = `${activeTab}-${step}` + setCopiedStep(key) + clearTimeout(copiedTimerRef.current) + copiedTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => setCopiedStep(null), COPY_FEEDBACK_MS) + emitFromLensCommandCopy(activeTab, step, commands[0]) + }, [activeTab]) const steps = activeTab === 'localhost' ?
